reviews.comment:
Siempre me atienden bien y siguen protocolos de atención. Lástima que cuando querés pagar desde la APP, dependiendo del lado del surtidor que estés debes bajar del auto. Eso tiene una solución fácil, que te lleven el código QR al auto, y que no esté pegado a surtidor. Es un cambio sencillo que hace la diferencia.

(Translated by Google)
They always treat me well and follow proper service protocols. It's a shame that when you want to pay through the app, depending on which side of the pump you're on, you have to get out of your car. There's an easy solution: have them bring the QR code to your car, instead of it being attached to the pump. It's a simple change that makes a big difference.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpN0xIc0J3EAE
